name: Pradhan Mantri Fasal Bima Yojana
description: Comprehensive crop insurance scheme against non-preventable natural risks

additional_rules: Must be growing notified crops in notified areas

benefit_description: Insurance cover against crop loss; premium rate capped at 1.5% - 2%

deep_eligibility_questions.question: Are you growing crops that are notified under the insurance scheme for your area?
